authority_scope.scope: synthetic exception records with severity and acknowledgment rules

propositions.statement: Normalize each exception into one stable identifier while retaining all source aliases.
Escalate a critical exception immediately even when an acknowledgment is already present.
Close a noncritical exception only after acknowledgment and resolution evidence are both linked.

contradictions.resolution: Critical severity invokes immediate escalation; closure evidence applies only to the noncritical path.

failure_signatures.signature: aliases are emitted as separate exceptions
critical exception waits for ordinary closure processing
noncritical exception closes without both evidence links

claim_boundary: Internal held-out interface calibration only; no expert or professional authority.
